# Housevilla

> Housevilla is a Kenyan rental property marketplace where tenants discover apartments, bedsitters, BnBs, maisonettes and bungalows, and landlords list and manage their properties.

Housevilla helps renters in Kenya find their next home with location-based search, verified listings, and a pay-to-unlock contact model that protects landlord privacy.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Housevilla and featured rental listings across Kenya.
- [Browse rentals](/browse): Search and filter all available properties by type, price, bedrooms, and distance.
- [Sign in or sign up](/auth): Create an account or sign in to contact landlords and list properties.
